title: Experience Livestream Sales Host – Sebago
description:
Join the Sebago Crew – We’re Hiring a Live-Streaming Host!

Sail into something new. Sebago is looking for passionate, confident, and driven individuals to bring our footwear to life on screen. If you're ready to take the spotlight and connect with audiences through livestreaming, we want to hear from you!

GET TO KNOW US!

Founded in Maine in 1946, Sebago is a heritage footwear brand rooted in craftsmanship, authenticity, and a timeless coastal spirit. From classic boat shoes to modern-day icons, Sebago is for those who value quality and adventure — both on land and at sea.

We’re now casting our next Live-Streaming Host to represent Sebago in Singapore and beyond through exciting, interactive, and sales-driven livestream content.

What You’ll Be Doing:

  • Go live on platforms like TikTok to promote Sebago’s products in a fun, engaging way
  • Talk viewers through our footwear styles, features, and stories behind the designs
  • Respond to comments and questions in real-time to build viewer connection and trust
  • Align each livestream with the Sebago voice — classic, confident, adventurous
  • Use creative storytelling and strong product knowledge to drive interest and sales
  • Work with our marketing and retail teams to plan campaign content and live calendar

We’re Looking For Someone Who:

  • Is confident, natural, and articulate on camera
  • Loves fashion, lifestyle, and footwear culture
  • Enjoys connecting with people and building community online
  • Has a flair for storytelling and knows how to make product features shine
  • Has prior experience in hosting, live streaming, or content creation (preferred, but not required)
  • Is committed to going live at least twice a week for 3 months
  • Can adapt to feedback and is open to continuous learning and improvement

Why Join Us:

  • Be the face of an iconic brand with decades of heritage
  • Gain livestream experience and build your personal hosting portfolio
  • Commission-based earnings with incentives based on performance
  • Flexible hours — weekdays or weekends based on availability

Interested?
Send us a short video introducing yourself and showcasing any relevant hosting experience. If you don’t have a past clip, film a 5 minute intro featuring a product you love. We want to see your personality shine!

Step into the Sebago spirit — apply now and help us bring classic footwear into the digital age.

postedCompany.description: Founded in 2000, Teamlink is a lifestyle brand distributor and retailer specialising in the South-East Asian market.With headquarters in Singapore, the team comprises of dynamic and diverse members with strong marketing and product development knowledge. Further enhanced with a strong sales team, the company is highly proficient in working in and within the region, ensuring value creation, elevated brand positioning and achievement of projected sales turnover.The Singapore distributors of Superga, Havaianas, RETROSUPERFUTURE and Sebago. Teamlink Marketing has established itself as brand builders in the space.
postedCompany.name: TEAMLINK MARKETING PTE LTD
